shorts.title: The AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos
shorts.title_distilled: AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos.
shorts.description: Data centers will swallow 14 percent of Archbald, evict a trailer park, and border many residential properties. Who's to blame is a matter of fierce debate.

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A brand new place of play is coming to Scranton: The city just landed a $100,000 grant to build a mini soccer pitch at Weston Field. shorts.title: Rep. Bresnahan requests $59 million for NEPA projects
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — Rep. Rob Bresnahan announced a request of $59 million in federal money for 20 NEPA projects. Bresnahan's office submitted 20 Community Project Funding (CPF) requests in advance of the 2027 fiscal year. The requests are to the House Committee on Appropriations and include the following projects:
shorts.content: (WBRE/WYOU) — Rep. Rob Bresnahan announced a request of $59 million in federal money for 20 NEPA projects. The requests are to the House Committee on Appropriations and include the following projects:
